name: Only on Action Filter: BLOCK (0)
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Action Filter

input.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Except on Always:
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Always

input.description: Always apply the output with one value

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Annotations: No annotation
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Annotations

input.description: Annotations

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Biome: Ocean
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Biome

input.description: Get biome type of a position

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Deciduous layer: [51% to 100%]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Deciduous layer

input.description: layer Deciduous with outputValues 0 to 15, where 0 is absent, 15 is full

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on distance to Macro Selection: [50m from edge to outside]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on distance to Macro Selection

input.description: distance to edge of Macro Selection with distance 0 to 100 where 0 is right at the edge. possibly very slow operation depending on how many blocks it has to check.

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Frost layer: OFF
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Frost layer

input.description: binary (ON or OFF) layer Frost

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Heatmap layer: [51% to 100%]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Heatmap layer

input.description: layer Heatmap with outputValues 0 to 15, where 0 is absent, 15 is full

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Height: [128 H to 319 H]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Height

input.description: get the height of a position in percent for 0 to 255.

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Macro Selection layer: OFF
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Macro Selection layer

input.description: binary (ON or OFF) layer Macro Selection

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Perlin Noise: [50 to 100]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Perlin Noise

input.description: Perlin Noise Generator

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Pine layer: [51% to 100%]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Pine layer

input.description: layer Pine with outputValues 0 to 15, where 0 is absent, 15 is full

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Random Chance: 9999 in 10000 blocks
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Random Chance

input.description: Generates random values for each block with a specified chance.

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Selection: OFF
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Selection

input.description: Worldpainter Default Selection Layer (yellow)

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Shadow: [Shadow depth 50 to Shadow depth 100]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Shadow

input.description: Calculate a naive shadowmap: sun hits from the south at 45° inclination

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Slope: [45° to 90°]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Slope

input.description: get the slope of a position in degrees from 0 to 90°

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Slope Direction: [180° S to 359° N]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Slope Direction

input.description: facing of a slope in 0 to 359° on the compass, 0 is north, 180 is south

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Terrain: Grass
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Terrain

input.description: surface terrain blocks

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Voronoi: [ID-50 to ID-100]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Voronoi

input.description: Voronoi Noise Generator

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on Water Depth: [50 deep to 100 deep]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on Water Depth

input.description: depth of water. if used as output, it only changes terrain height, not water level!

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: Only on water level: [128 to 319]
description: Filter: Reject blocks based on water level

input.description: absolute water level

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.

name: set Action Filter to PASS (1)
description: Default simple applier.

input.description: Always apply the output with one value

output.description: only blocks that pass this filter will be used in following actions.
